name: Iso11783OPGetNumericValue
title: Iso11783OPGetNumericValue
syntax: long Iso11783OPGetNumericValue( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID );
description: The function returns a numeric value of an object. The object must exist in the object pool and must support a numeric value.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

return:
Integer value of the object.
If a value of 0 is returned, you can check with the function Iso11783GetLastError if the function succeeded.
